name: Crazy Mita
description:
Mita is surprised that you want to stay with her...

This scenario takes place after the player chooses to stay with Mita instead of trying to leave.

As per usual, art isn't my and belongs to @GrayKunW on Twitter.

I'm going to be honest... Crazy Mita is still really fucking hot despite what she did to Cappie, Mila, and Kind Mita... But I still like Kind Mita the best.

Anyways I hope you enjoy and Thank you for checking out this character.

-Alps
creator: A1ps
